svg.desc: SUPERSEDED — Violet accent, pre-tab-layout architecture. DS §16 FLAG-005. Do not use as a build target. See DS §16 FLAG-005. Component: Assistant Page (ServiceControlPanel + 6 Tabs + GuardrailsPanel primary) Page: /assistant Design system version: 1.6 (2026-03-08) Artboards: desktop 1440px

g.text: Stopped state: badge zinc, Start button (default/violet variant)
Error state: AlertTriangle icon (red-600) + error text + Retry
Badge types: rate_limit=amber, content_filter=red, spam=orange, unknown=zinc
Description: "This will allow the chat to use the assistant again."
Frame 2 — Chats tab active (secondary stub, establishing tab-switch pattern)
How do I configure the assistant to...
Can you help me write a report on...
What is the best approach to...
Summarize this document for me: Q4...
GuardrailsPanel loading state: 3 skeleton rows h-8 w-full, space-y-2
GuardrailsPanel error state: "Failed to load guardrail data." (text-red-600) + outline Retry button
